meta.description: Enforceable steps extracted from the dev domain handler

tasks.spec: Write a failing test that proves the requirement exists before any implementation.
tasks.verify_cmd: grep -rl 'describe\|it(\|test(' tests/ 2>/dev/null | head -1 && echo PASS || echo FAIL

tasks.spec: Implement the minimum code to make the failing test pass.
Refactor implementation while keeping all tests green.
Coder agent completes TDD implementation with all tests passing.
Code-simplifier agent minimizes code while preserving all functionality and passing tests.
Reviewer agent checks for bugs, YAGNI violations, and code quality issues.
Tester agent verifies unit tests and visual tests (TUI/web) all pass.
Doc agent adds JSDoc annotations and updates README for changed components.
tasks.verify_cmd: grep -rl '@param\|@returns\|@description' src/ 2>/dev/null | head -3 && echo PASS || echo FAIL

tasks.spec: Every non-trivial source file has a :ctx block with :arch:, :why:, :deps:, :rules:, :edge: fields (max 6 lines).
tasks.verify_cmd: grep -rl ':arch:\|:why:\|:deps:' src/ 2>/dev/null | head -5 && echo PASS || echo FAIL

tasks.spec: Code follows dev style: no blank lines between statements (comments to separate), single-line ifs, functional chaining, modern ES6+, ternaries when readable.
tasks.verify_cmd: npx eslint src/ --max-warnings=0 2>&1 | tail -5 || echo 'Manual style review required'

tasks.spec: No single-use helpers (inline <10 lines), no premature abstractions (Rule of Three), single file until >500 lines.
tasks.verify_cmd: wc -l src/**/*.{js,ts} 2>/dev/null | sort -rn | head -5 || echo 'No files to check'

tasks.spec: TUI processes never run in main terminal — always via tmux or VHS.
Web verification uses Playwright MCP or webapp-testing skill for deterministic checks.
